text.title: Documentation Examples
text.summary: Example AGENTS.md for a python module.

section.title: src/auth/AGENTS.md
section.code:
# auth
JWT issuance + verification + refresh.
| File | Kind | Why | |------|------|-----| | jwt.py | core | sign + verify | | middleware.py | core | DRF auth class | | views.py | api | login / refresh / logout endpoints | | tests/ | tests | pytest suite |
## Commands
- run tests: `pytest src/auth/` - regenerate JWT key: `python manage.py rotate_jwt_key`
## Gotchas
- `JWT_SIGNING_KEY` must be set in settings; missing key fails silently in non-strict mode. - Refresh tokens are 7-day TTL; tests freeze time with `freezegun`.
